---
title: "Built with Viash · run on Viash Hub"
order: 20
---

**[Viash](https://viash.io)** turns a config (`config.vsh.yaml`) plus a script
into a containerized component *and* a Nextflow VDSL3 module. Because every
component is containerized and versioned, a local run and a cloud run behave
identically.

- A **module** does one job (normalize, cluster, filter).
- A **workflow** chains modules into a pipeline.
- Both are built by Viash; the build output lives in `target/`.

**[Viash Hub](https://www.viash-hub.com)** is the web catalog where those
components live. You can browse them, read their parameters, and launch workflows
through a GUI — or connect to Seqera — without touching the command line.

This is also why the [reference](../reference/index.qmd) can be auto-generated:
the same configs that build the components produce their documentation.

*Content to be expanded from the current `fundamentals` pages.*
